creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just figured out that I must not have inspected the new patch.  This converted @dirrm to @dir, when the instructions were to *REMOVE* the lines, see:
  "Please remove all the @dirrm* lines in the pkg-plist, and check with poudriere again."

It's cleaned up now.

It's a lesson to both, I got sloppy on my review.
